scripts.dev: npm run build:vendors && npm run build:js && npm run build:css && astro dev
scripts.build: npm run build:vendors && npm run build:js && npm run build:css && astro build
scripts.build:vendors: cp node_modules/jquery/dist/jquery.min.js public/assets/js/jquery.min.js && cp node_modules/p5/lib/p5.min.js public/assets/js/p5.min.js
scripts.build:js: awk 'FNR==1 && NR!=1{print ""}1' src/scripts/tools/encode.min.js src/scripts/tools/jquery.detectmobile.min.js src/scripts/tools/jquery.fitvids.min.js src/scripts/tools/vector2d.min.js > public/assets/js/tools.min.js && cat src/scripts/main.js src/scripts/nodeField.js > public/assets/js/ivaylogetov.min.js && cp src/scripts/cube.js public/assets/js/cube.min.js
